fullText: [Music] excessive expansion uncovering critical security vulnerabilities in Jenkins Jenkins is the leading open- Source automation server widely used for building deploying and automating software projects recently sonar's vulnerability research team has discovered two security vulnerabilities in shenkin the Discover critical vulnerability tracked as cve 2024 23897 allows unauthenticated attackers limited Rec capabilities of AR arrary files and read only authorized attackers to an entire arbitrary file from jenin server depending on the context the arbitrary read capabilities could lead to rce as demonstrated now the second finding cve 2024 23898 has a potential to execute arbitrary commands as the victim by manipulating them to visit a malicious link for this demonstration we are signed in as an admin clicking the link can trigger malicious code in the background the vulnerabilities were fixed in Jenkins version 2.44 I and LTS 2.42 6.3 you can find the full technical details on this vulnerability at source.com blog
